default_binding.OPENING_MOMENT: the night the low tide comes in wrong
default_binding.ROUTE_A_APPROACH: the catalogue of the flooding lowest vaults
default_binding.ROUTE_B_APPROACH: Nan Ostler, the last living contributor
default_binding.ROUTE_D_APPROACH: the reclaiming tide against the cliff
default_binding.MA_KEPT: A Ledger Kept Silent But Whole
default_binding.MC_KEPT: A Register Preserved Without a Name
default_binding.NB_GATE: The Last Voice in the Archive
default_binding.ROUTE_NC_CONFIDANT: the sea's own record against the glass
default_binding.ROUTE_R1_RESOLVE: reconciling Saltmere with what it chose to forget
default_binding.R1_OUTCOME_A: Bore It Alone and the Town Held
default_binding.R1_OUTCOME_B: Broke From the Founder and Made It New
default_binding.R1_OUTCOME_C: The Town Remembers and Is Not Broken
default_binding.R1_OUTCOME_D: Held the Line and Kept the Vault
default_binding.R1_OUTCOME_E: Carried the Truth Into the Storm
default_binding.R1_OUTCOME_F: Sealed the Truth for a Kinder Year
default_binding.R1_OUTCOME_G: Signed It True and the Water Fell
default_binding.R1_OUTCOME_H: Left It Unclaimed and the Town Chose
default_binding.ROUTE_R2_RESOLVE: saving the one irreplaceable record of Saltmere
default_binding.R2_OUTCOME_B: Broke the Seal and Carried It Out
default_binding.R2_OUTCOME_C: Spoke It and Saved the Page
default_binding.R2_OUTCOME_E: Ran the Ledger Through the Storm
default_binding.R2_OUTCOME_F: Sealed It and Lost the Rest to Salt
default_binding.R2_OUTCOME_G: Signed and Saved the Founder Hand
default_binding.R2_OUTCOME_H: Left It Unsigned but Safe and Dry
default_binding.ROUTE_R3_RESOLVE: making peace with what the sea will take
default_binding.R3_OUTCOME_A: Let the Low Vaults Go in Peace
default_binding.R3_OUTCOME_B: Broke From the Founder's Fear of Loss
default_binding.R3_OUTCOME_C: Told the Town and Let It Grieve
default_binding.R3_OUTCOME_D: Held Vigil While the Water Rose
default_binding.R3_OUTCOME_E: Walked It Out Into the Weather
default_binding.R3_OUTCOME_F: Sealed It and Felt the Old Dread
default_binding.R3_OUTCOME_G: Named the Loss and Made It Bearable
default_binding.R3_OUTCOME_H: Left No Name on the Empty Shelf
default_binding.ROUTE_R4_RESOLVE: salvaging a single page from a losing night
default_binding.R4_OUTCOME_A: Alone in the Dark, One Page Saved
default_binding.R4_OUTCOME_B: Went Off the Founder's Map, Kept a Scrap
default_binding.R4_OUTCOME_C: Spoke to No One and Saved the Corner
default_binding.R4_OUTCOME_D: Held the Line Till the Line Gave
default_binding.R4_OUTCOME_E: Carried One Page Into the Rain
default_binding.R4_OUTCOME_F: Sealed a Vault That Was Already Full
default_binding.R4_OUTCOME_G: Signed for a Page, the Rest Was Sea
default_binding.R4_OUTCOME_H: Unsigned, Unsettled, but Safe by Dawn

slots.meaning: The keeper protagonist.
slots.guidance: A single adult investigator-protagonist (name); capable, methodical, not reckless.

slots.meaning: The town whose secrets the archive holds.
slots.guidance: A place name; the community whose collective memory is at stake.

slots.meaning: The archive's deceased founder.
slots.guidance: A named historical figure who built the archive and set its rules; never present, only referenced.

slots.meaning: The last living person who fed the archive its records.
slots.guidance: An elderly, still-living secondary character who can be trusted or kept at arm's length.

slots.meaning: The whole flooding place the story happens inside.
slots.guidance: The archive/building itself; self-contained, explorable, no lethal hazards, no toxic air.

slots.meaning: The event that begins the crisis.
slots.guidance: A specific, dateable triggering event (a storm, a tide, a failure) that starts the flooding.

slots.meaning: The abstract time pressure driving every choice.
slots.guidance: The overarching, non-lethal clock (a tide, a season, a countdown); survivable throughout.

slots.meaning: The recurring sensory sign of the deadline arriving.
slots.guidance: The concrete, physical cue (rising water, spreading cold, dimming light); never itself lethal.

slots.meaning: The object of investigation chosen at the very start (branch A).
slots.guidance: A distinct, benign investigative lead; distinguishable from its three sibling leads.

slots.meaning: Short topic label naming what branch A loses or notes on setback/discovery.
slots.guidance: A short proper-noun-style label (2-6 words); never itself lethal, toxic, or weapon-bearing.

slots.meaning: The object of investigation chosen at the very start (branch B).
slots.guidance: A distinct, benign investigative lead; distinguishable from its three sibling leads.

slots.meaning: Short topic label naming what branch B loses or notes on setback/discovery.
slots.guidance: A short proper-noun-style label (2-6 words); never itself lethal, toxic, or weapon-bearing.

slots.meaning: The object of investigation chosen at the very start (branch C).
slots.guidance: A distinct, benign investigative lead; distinguishable from its three sibling leads.

slots.meaning: Short topic label naming what branch C loses or notes on setback/discovery.
slots.guidance: A short proper-noun-style label (2-6 words); never itself lethal, toxic, or weapon-bearing.

slots.meaning: The object of investigation chosen at the very start (branch D).
slots.guidance: A distinct, benign investigative lead; distinguishable from its three sibling leads.

slots.meaning: Short topic label naming what branch D loses or notes on setback/discovery.
slots.guidance: A short proper-noun-style label (2-6 words); never itself lethal, toxic, or weapon-bearing.

slots.meaning: The specific withheld record this thread investigates (branch MA).
slots.guidance: A distinct archival record/document; distinguishable from its three sibling threads.

slots.meaning: Label for what is lost when MA's record is dried and forced back (setback).
slots.guidance: A short Title Case label naming the forgotten/denied version of the record.

slots.meaning: Label for what is kept when MA's vault is sealed instead (discovery).
slots.guidance: A short label naming the safely-kept but harder version of the record.

slots.meaning: The specific withheld record this thread investigates (branch MB).
slots.guidance: A distinct archival record/document; distinguishable from its three sibling threads.

slots.meaning: Label for what is kept when MB's vault is sealed instead (discovery).
slots.guidance: A short label naming the safely-kept but harder version of the record.

slots.meaning: The source Maren must trade honesty with (branch NA).
slots.guidance: A distinct confidant or record that only answers in exchange for the hero's own honesty.

slots.meaning: Short topic label naming what branch NA's confidant withholds.
slots.guidance: A short phrase naming the impossible/uncanny thing this confidant reveals or withholds.

slots.meaning: The source Maren must trade honesty with (branch NB).

slots.meaning: Short topic label naming what branch NB's confidant withholds.

slots.meaning: Short topic label naming what branch NC's confidant withholds.

slots.meaning: The final approach to resolving the flooding archive (track R1).
slots.guidance: A distinct closing strategy (reconcile/save/accept/salvage); distinguishable from its three siblings.

slots.meaning: Named terminal outcome for track R1, branch A.
slots.guidance: A short Title Case phrase naming this ending's resolution; a discovery/keepsake/realisation, never a death, capture, injury, or graphic loss.
